Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a cluster

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is unable to create a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} deleted a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is creating a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to stop a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} created a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to start a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is changing a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} started a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is stopping a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is starting a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} stopped a cluster of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
